authorization_phrase: Catalogue the weekly RS line as clean-generalization-confirmed DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY and park.

s18_d1_broad_universe_24name.caveat: thin OOS edge and a NEGATIVE most-recent fold (F5); K13 3/5 (marginal supermajority); recent-fold weakness

s19_d1_independent_universe_24name.finding: edge GENERALIZED to an independent 24-name universe (positive IS + cost + 5/5 K13 + a positive OOS even stronger per-trade) BUT the candidate was K9-terminal: 87 OOS trades (43.6/y) < the >=50/y floor
s19_d1_independent_universe_24name.oos: 87 trades (43.6/y), net +$44,050, expectancy +$336/trade, sharpe +0.238 -- positive but sample-terminal

s20_d1_combined_universe_48name.finding: broadening the ranking pool to the 48-name s18+s19 UNION at fixed M=8 STRUCTURALLY SOLVED the s19 OOS-K9 blocker WITHOUT tuning (OOS 43.6/y -> 67.2/y); full ladder passed. SELECTION CAVEAT: the union included the known-OOS-good s18 basket -> a sample-size demonstration, NOT clean generalization

s21_d1_fresh_universe_48name.finding: ran the identical mechanic on a FRESH 48-name universe with ZERO overlap vs s17/s18/s19 (0/48 names ever backtested under this mechanic) -> NO selection bias -> the s18/s20 weekly RS edge GENERALIZES cleanly to a genuinely fresh universe. RESOLVES the s20 selection caveat. Largest OOS-K9 margin of the line

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (incl. the clean s21 result) is a research-phase label, NOT a promotion.

line_identity.candidates: s18, s19, s20, s21 -- ALL ran the IDENTICAL byte-locked mechanic; ONLY the universe differed; none was a tune/revN of another; M=8 never changed
line_identity.mechanic_unified_byte_locked: cross-sectional relative-strength rotation, WEEKLY: 126-21 skip-month signal; rank universe; hold top-M=8 equal-weight (1/M); long-only; relative-rank rotation exit (no trailing/ATR stop); $100k; split_only; tiingo; warmup 160; IS 2019-01-02..2023-12-29; OOS 2024-01-02..2025-12-30; K13 = 5 pre-committed UNSEARCHED DA22 folds

line_level_conclusion.headline: The weekly RS rotation line is the STRONGEST COMPLETED DIAGNOSTIC EDGE in the research program: the only line to reach OOS_CONFIRMED, and now CLEAN-GENERALIZATION-CONFIRMED -- the edge OOS-confirms on a fresh never-tested universe (s21), not merely on baskets containing known winners.
line_level_conclusion.honest_strength_statement: STRONGEST COMPLETED DIAGNOSTIC EDGE -- but a diagnostic edge, modest in magnitude, and permanently DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY. 'Strongest diagnostic' is NOT 'live-ready' and NOT 'money-proven'.
what_is_NOT_established: NOT a large edge: the clean fresh-universe per-trade edge is MODEST (+$171/trade); generalization != magnitude.
NOT live/paper-grade: every result is DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; the 6-gate live-block and FRC-never-granted apply regardless of how strong the diagnostic is.
NO live path exists by framework design -- there is no authorization that promotes any candidate to live/paper/Strategy-Lab.
what_is_established: The cross-sectional relative-strength weekly rotation premium is REAL and PORTABLE: positive across multiple universes through IS + cost-stress + walk-forward K13 + OOS.
Its recurring blocker (OOS sample / K9) is SOLVABLE by universe breadth at fixed held-N, WITHOUT tuning (s20 proved it; s21 showed it holds on fresh names).
The clean fresh-universe test (s21) removes selection bias and confirms genuine generalization.

park_decision.no_revival_required: candidates remain individually frozen/sealed; this catalog does not modify them
park_decision.reactivation_note: Any future work on this mechanic would be a NEW candidate with its own RUN_BOOK/PLAN; this catalog does not authorize it.
park_decision.reason: Clean generalization is now confirmed (s21); the line's central research question -- does the weekly RS edge generalize? -- is answered YES (real, portable, modest, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY). Further same-mechanic candidates would add marginal diagnostic confidence only; there is no live path regardless.

title: Weekly relative-strength rotation research line (s18->s21) CATALOG -- clean-generalization-CONFIRMED, strongest completed diagnostic edge, DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, PARKED (NOT live/paper-ready; FRC NEVER_GRANTED)
